name: Chuck Roast New England Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle meat with seasonings.
2. Place onions, carrots, and celery in the crockpot.
3. Top with meat.
4. Add bay leaf, vinegar, and water to the pot.
5. Cover and cook on low for 5-7 hours or until meat is tender.
6. Remove meat and turn the setting to high.
7. Add cabbage wedges; cover and cook on high for 15-20 minutes or until cabbage is done.
8. Meanwhile, melt butter in a saucepan.
9. Stir in instant onion and flour.
10. Drain 1-1/2 cups broth from the cooking pot.
11. Pour the drained broth, horseradish, and salt into the saucepan.
12. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and smooth.
13. Serve sauce over roast with vegetables.
